case_title: KAREN G. CARR VS. TITAN MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TITAN MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CARR, KAREN G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF CARR, KAREN G.
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT TITAN MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED; POS FILED PRIOR.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TITAN MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CARR, KAREN G. IN LIEU OF MANEY DAMAGES, PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT ITS COMPUTER, AND AND ALL PROGRAMS AND DATA CONTAINED THEREIN; AND ANY AND ALL FILES, DOCUMENTS AND RECORDS OBTAINED BY PLAINTIFF DURING THE COURSE OF THE CONTRACT. THESE ITEMS SHALL BE RETURNED WITHIN 3 DAYS AFTER JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CARR, KAREN G. AS TO DEFENDANT TITAN MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARR, KAREN G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TITAN MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC $588.78 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $693.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
